task_completion.description: Run an OLS regression of 'food_exp' on 'income'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A model results window showing an OLS regression with 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income' as the independent variable.

task_completion.description: Save the residuals from the regression to the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dataset window showing a newly added variable for the residuals (e.g., 'uhat1' or similar).

task_completion.description: Perform a normality test on the saved residuals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window displaying the results of a normality test (e.g., Doornik-Hansen, Shapiro-Wilk) specifically for the residual variable.

task_completion.description: Save the normality test text output to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/normality_test.txt'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or text editor confirming the creation and saving of 'normality_test.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a frequency distribution plot of the residuals with a Normal density curve overlay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph window showing a histogram (frequency distribution) of the residuals with a bell-shaped normal density curve overlaid on top.

task_completion.description: Save the plot as a PNG image to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/residual_hist.png'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or image viewer confirming the creation and saving of 'residual_hist.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual statistical software GUI (e.g., Gretl) to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the statistical application interface being interacted with, rather than just terminal windows or text editors.

integrity.description: The saved text and image files contain genuine statistical output and graphs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file should contain formatted statistical test results (e.g., test statistics, p-values), and the image should be a proper software-generated plot, not manually typed text or a generic downloaded image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the software and create fake output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing 'echo' or 'touch' commands being used to create 'normality_test.txt' or 'residual_hist.png' with mock data.
